'''Grain maggots''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Insect/Legends|insect]] which members of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] species would roast and [[Foodstuff/Legends|eat]]. After roasting, most maggots would lie in crispy husks although some would continue to squirm in an attempt to survive, although all would be eaten, [[Death/Legends|dead]] or alive. In [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], the Hutt [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Durga Besadii Tai]] had roasted [[Grain/Legends|grain]] maggots served at a meal in his [[Durga's palace|palace]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]], which was attended by several of his cousins and the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomats]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]].<ref name="DS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Grain maggots were first mentioned in the [[1995]] novel [[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']], written by [[Kevin J. Anderson]].<ref name="DS" />

*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] {{1st}}
